Hkkjrh; fodykax dY;k.k VªLV] lkÃ leFkZ lkslk;Vh ds ikl] ch@,p ljnk;ru Ldwy] mejk] lwjr] xqtjkr Þ¼28½ Mk- th- eqfujRue] &lnL; jk"Vªh; lsok lfefr] vUue¸;k ekxZ] ,vkÃvkj ckÃikl jksM] fr#ifr &517001] fpÙkwj ftyk ¼vka-ç-½ [Qk-la- 25&01@2013&MhMh&III@,uvkÃ] MkSyh pØcrhZ] la;qDr lfpo -- 3 of 6 -- 4 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] MINISTRY OF SOCIAL JUSTICE AND EMPOWERMENT (Department of Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities) (DIVYANGJAN) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 6th February, 2018 S.O. 548 (E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-Section (1) and (3) of Section 3 of the Rehabilitation Council of India Act, 1992 (34 of 1992), the Central Government hereby appoints the following persons as members in the General Council of Rehabilitation Council of India and for that purpose makes the following further amendment in the following notifications of the Government of India in the Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment, Department of Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities (Divyangjan):- (i) In the notification number S.O.2479(E), dated the 15th October, 2008, with effect from the date of publication of this notification, for serial numbers (11) and (12) and the entries relating thereto, the following serial numbers and entries shall be substituted, namely:- Appointed under clause (e) of the sub-section (3) of Section 3 “(11) The Director, -Member Department of Social Justice and Empowerment, Govt. of Haryana, Chandigarh “(12) The Director, -Member Department of Social Justice and Empowerment, Govt. of Himachal Pradesh, Shimla (ii) In the notification number S.O. 3533(E), dated the 29th November, 2013, with effect from the date of publication of this notification, for serial number (13) and entry relating thereto, the following serial number and entry shall be substituted, namely:- Appointed under clause (f) of the sub-section (3) of Section 3 “(13) Shri Paras C. Shah, -Member Plot No. 217/A, Chaitanya, Road No. 6, Vijayrajnagar, Opp. Sneh Sagar Complex, Bhavnagar-364003 (iii) In the notification number S.O. 2479(E), dated the 15th October, 2008, with effect from the date of publication of this notification, for serial numbers (14) to (18) and entries relating thereto, the following serial numbers and entries shall be substituted, namely:- Appointed under clause (f) of the sub-section (3) of Section 3 “(14) Ms. Ruma Banerjee, -Member Seva-in-Action, 36, S.T.Bed Layout, Koramangla, Bangalore-560034 “(15) Shri Bimal Kumar Jain, -Member 404-D, Patna Super Market, B Block, Fraser Road, Patna-800001 “(16) Shri Kamla Kant Pandey, -Member -- 4 of 6 -- ¹Hkkx IIμ[k.M 3(ii)º Hkkjr dk jkti=k % vlk/kj.k 5 74/6/1, Gangapuram, Chotta Bhagada, Allahabad- 211002, “(17) Ms. Uma Tuli, -Member Amar Jyoti Research and Rehabilitation Centre, Vikas Marg, Karkardooma, Delhi “(18) Dr. N. Muthaiah, -Member Principal, Sri Ramakrishna Mission Vidyalaya College of Education, Coimbatore-641020 (iv) In the notification number S.O. 3533(E), dated the 29th November, 2013, with effect from the date of publication of this notification, for serial number (19) and entry relating thereto, the following serial number and entry shall be substituted, namely:- Appointed under clause (g) of the sub-section (3) of Section 3 “(19) Dr. Manisha Aggarwal, -Member H.No. 10, Sector-1, Ambala, Haryana (v) In the notification number S.O. 292(E), dated the 30th January, 2014, with effect from the date of publication of this notification, for serial number (20) and entry relating thereto, the following serial number and entry shall be substituted, namely:- Appointed under clause (g) of the sub-section (3) of Section 3 “(20) Dr. Pawan Sthapak, -Member M.D.(Ophthalmologist), Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh (vi) In the notification number S.O. 639(E), dated the 4th March, 2014, with effect from the date of publication of this notification, for serial number (21) and entry relating thereto, the following serial number and entry shall be substituted, namely:- Appointed under clause (g) of the sub-section (3) of Section 3 “(21) Dr. Santanu Lahkar, -Member Dibrugarh (vii) In the notification number S.O.639(E), dated the 4th March, 2014, with effect from the date of publication of this notification, for serial number (22) and entry relating thereto, the following serial number and entry shall be substituted, namely:- Appointed under clause (g) of the sub-section (3) of Section 3 “(22) Dr. Yogesh Kumar Trikha, -Member Trikha Clinic, L-1/122 A, DDA Flats, Kalkaji, Behind Aravali Apartments, Alaknanada, Delhi-110019 -- 5 of 6 -- 6 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] (viii) In the notification number S.O.3533(E), dated the 29th November, 2013, with effect from the date of publication of this notification, for serial number (26) and entry relating thereto, the following serial number and entry shall be substituted, namely:- Appointed under clause (i) of the sub-section (3) of Section 3 “(26) Shri Pankaj Maru, -Member 3/10, Adarsh Gandhi Gram Colony, Nagda Jn.-456335 (M.P.) (ix) In the notification number S.O.2479(E), dated the 15th October, 2008, with effect from the date of publication of this notification, for serial numbers (27) and (28) and entries relating thereto, the following serial numbers and entries shall be substituted, namely:- Appointed under clause (i) of the sub-section (3) of Section 3 “(27) Shri Kanubahi Tailor, -Member Disable Welfare Trust of India, Near Sai Samarth Society, B/H Sardayatan School, Umara, Surat, Gujarat “(28) Dr. G.Muniratnam, -Member Rashtriya Seva Samithi, Annamayya Marg, AIR Byepass Road, Tirupati-517001, Chittoor Distt. (A.P) [F.No. 25-01/2013-DDIII/NI] DOLLY CHAKRABARTY, Jt. Secy.
